question: Does the new background clearly depict a modern minimalist coffee shop environment?
Are the requested architectural features (white walls, polished concrete floor, floor-to-ceiling windows) visible?
Are the specific decor elements (sleek pendant lighting, minimal potted plants) present in the scene?
Are all original Victorian background elements (patterned wallpaper, ornate paintings, lace curtains, fireplace) completely removed?
Are the people originally seated in the background completely removed from the image?
Is the elderly woman in the foreground preserved with her original pose, expression, and identity intact?
Are the woman's clothing (patterned dress, apron) and accessories (glasses, jewelry) completely preserved?
Is the complete tea service (teapot, cup, saucer, glass pitcher) and pastry plate preserved without distortion?
Is the dark polished wooden table and serving tray preserved with original wood grain and shape?
Does the lighting on the foreground subjects match the directional side-light suggested by the new floor-to-ceiling windows?
Do the highlights on the table surface and tea service appear natural and consistent with the new light source?
Do the reflections on the glass pitcher and crystal items match the new bright window environment?
Are the shadows cast by the foreground elements consistent in direction and softness with the new window lighting?
Is the edge blending around the woman (particularly her wispy hair) natural, with no visible halos or cutout artifacts?
Is the perspective of the new floor and background consistent with the angle of the foreground table?
Is the image free of AI artifacts such as warped objects, duplicated edges, or inconsistent resolution?
